'''ngalovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psaltery|psaltery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psaltery|psaltery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngalovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæleveth|ngæleveth]] || [[word:ngælevej|ngælevej]] || [[word:ngælevesh|ngælevesh]] || [[word:ngæleve|ngæleve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalolovoth|ngalolovoth]] || [[word:ngalolovoj|ngalolovoj]] || [[word:ngalolovosh|ngalolovosh]] || [[word:ngalolovo|ngalolovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngalovoth|ngalovoth]] || [[word:ngalovoj|ngalovoj]] || [[word:ngalovosh|ngalovosh]] || [[word:ngalovo|ngalovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalofvoth|ngalofvoth]] || [[word:ngalofvoj|ngalofvoj]] || [[word:ngalofvosh|ngalofvosh]] || [[word:ngalofvof|ngalofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngalovotho|ngalovotho]] || [[word:ngalovojo|ngalovojo]] || [[word:ngalovosho|ngalovosho]] || [[word:ngalovoko|ngalovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngalovoth|ngalovoth]] || [[word:ngalovoj|ngalovoj]] || [[word:ngalovosh|ngalovosh]] || [[word:ngalovo|ngalovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngalovothol|ngalovothol]] || [[word:ngalovojol|ngalovojol]] || [[word:ngalovoshol|ngalovoshol]] || [[word:ngalovokol|ngalovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngalovothotho|ngalovothotho]] || [[word:ngalovojojo|ngalovojojo]] || [[word:ngalovoshosho|ngalovoshosho]] || [[word:ngalovoko|ngalovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngalovothon|ngalovothon]] || [[word:ngalovojon|ngalovojon]] || [[word:ngalovoshon|ngalovoshon]] || [[word:ngalovokon|ngalovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngalovothoro|ngalovothoro]] || [[word:ngalovojoro|ngalovojoro]] || [[word:ngalovoshoro|ngalovoshoro]] || [[word:ngalovokoro|ngalovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
